title: Senior Customer-Facing AI Engineer
description:
We're hiring a Senior Customer-Facing AI Engineer to partner directly with enterprise customers deploying Claude in production. You'll be embedded with customer teams, scoping use cases, designing agentic workflows with tool use, evaluating model outputs, tuning prompts, and shipping production integrations. You'll also run workshops and enablement sessions for technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Responsibilities:
- Lead technical discovery and solution design with enterprise AI adopters
- Architect agentic workflows using Claude's tool-use, MCP servers, and multi-step reasoning
- Build proof-of-concepts and reference integrations in TypeScript/Python
- Run evaluation frameworks and prompt tuning loops to measure quality
- Partner with product and research to influence roadmap based on customer feedback
- Facilitate customer workshops, training sessions, and executive briefings

Requirements:
- 5+ years in customer-facing technical roles (SE, PS, TAM, Solutions Architect)
- Strong hands-on AI/LLM experience — prompt engineering, agent design, evaluation
- Experience with MCP, function calling, and tool-use patterns
- Proven track record scoping complex enterprise deployments
- Excellent communication skills — comfortable presenting to VPs and engineers alike
- Experience with implementation consulting, change management, or enablement preferred
